one_time_description: Impairment loss on investment in Venturion Oil Limited to reflect value of shares redeemed for Cardinal Energy Ltd.
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Six Nations Ventures L.P. (16.6%), Uujo Development L.P. (100%), and Uujo Management G.P. Ltd. (100%). Also holds investment in Venturion Oil Ltd. (subsequently sold to Cardinal Energy Ltd.) and EBA Development Corp. at cost. Site C Impact and Benefit Agreement with BC Hydro. Treaty Land Entitlement negotiations ongoing with Government of Canada. Doig River Cattle L.P. consolidated. Community Development Trust manages Heritage Trust Fund and Agriculture Benefits Claim settlement.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Province is BC (Doig River FN is in northeastern BC). Net debt position of $6.46M. TLE debt of $6.17M is separate from long-term debt. Venturion Oil impairment of $515,944 is a one-time item. Income allocations from Nation businesses of $2,816,132 recorded as other income (modified equity method). Three entities consolidated (Doig River Cattle L.P., Doig Not For Profit Trust, Community Development Trust); three GBEs on modified equity method. Prior accumulated surplus includes remeasurement losses. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + OGC + FNHA + Grants + Other gov + ESDC + CMHC + BC = 2,358,225+751,098+615,851+172,181+140,562+99,977+19,030+4,202,894 = 8,359,818; OSR = 12,285,065 - 8,359,818 = 3,925,247. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
